sections.name: History
sections.asr_prompt: Pediatric history. Chief complaint. Course of illness. Past medical: birth history, vaccinations, prior illnesses, allergies. Family history.

sections.name: Anthropometry
sections.asr_prompt: Weight, height, head circumference. Growth percentiles. Developmental milestones for age.

sections.name: Physical Examination
sections.asr_prompt: Pediatric examination. General appearance, alertness. Temperature, HR, RR, SpO2. Skin, mucous membranes. Throat. Lymph nodes. Heart and lung auscultation. Abdomen. Meningeal signs.

sections.name: Diagnosis
sections.asr_prompt: Pediatric diagnosis. Primary, complications, comorbidities. ICD-10.

sections.name: Plan
sections.asr_prompt: Treatment plan. Medications dosed by weight + age. Activity. Diet. Caregiver guidance. Follow-up.
